# Astral Gardens

## Summary

The `AstralGardens` spec is a card that showcases an immersive, multi-sensory art installation set in a cosmic landscape. It provides details about the various experience sections, upcoming show dates, ticket pricing, and location.

## Import

```javascript
import { AstralGardens } from 'https://cardstack.com/base/card-api';
```

## Usage as a Field

The `AstralGardens` card can be used as a field within a consuming card or field. For example:

```javascript
@field astralGardens = contains(AstralGardens);
```

## Template Usage

To use the `AstralGardens` card in a template, you can invoke it as follows:

```handlebars
<AstralGardens @model={{this.astralGardens}} />
```

This will render the `AstralGardens` card with the provided model data.
